title: Agent Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter required at the top of every agents/<slug>/AGENT.md.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must match the folder name agents/<id>/.

class.description: runtime = user-facing; build = skill-library factory agent.

version.description: Semver. Bump when the agent's plan or output contract changes.

requires_org.description: True if the agent refuses without a live-org target alias.

modes.description: Named operational modes. Single-mode agents use ["single"]; dual-mode use e.g. ["design", "audit"]. Enumerated to catch typos at schema time (historical bugs: ["n", "audit"], ["s"]). Extend the enum when a new mode is genuinely needed.

owner.description: Team or handle responsible for this agent.

compatible_mcp.description: Optional: minimum MCP tool wave this agent requires (e.g. "wave-0").

expected_mcp_calls.description: Optional: rough upper bound on MCP tool invocations per run — surfaces cost.

deprecated_in_favor_of.description: Required iff status == deprecated. The replacement agent id.

harness.description: Optional: declares the agent inherits a shared harness under agents/_shared/harnesses/. The validator enforces shape compliance for declared harnesses. designer_base was added in Wave 3c.

dependencies.description: Wave 8: explicit declaration of the files this agent needs to function. Used by `scripts/export_skills.py --agent <id>` to bundle the agent with its dependencies for install into another repo. Populating this block is optional on existing agents (a migration script auto-populates from Mandatory Reads); required on new agents created after Wave 8.

probes.description: Probe recipe filenames under agents/_shared/probes/, e.g. 'user-access-comparison.md'.

shared.description: Filenames under agents/_shared/ that this agent reads, e.g. 'AGENT_CONTRACT.md', 'REFUSAL_CODES.md'.

dependency_path_mode.description: How citation paths inside this AGENT.md are written. 'repo-absolute' (default for in-tree agents) = paths like 'agents/_shared/probes/foo.md' valid only from repo root. 'bundle-relative' (set by the exporter) = paths like './probes/foo.md' valid inside a bundled export. Never hand-edit; the exporter sets this when producing a bundle.

multi_dimensional.description: Wave 10: set true if the agent's output covers 3+ distinct dimensions that could be compared / skipped independently (e.g. user-access-diff, org-drift-detector, deployment-risk-scorer). Multi-dimensional agents MUST enumerate dimensions_compared and dimensions_skipped in their output envelope. Defaults false.

output_formats.description: Wave 10: the formats the agent natively emits as deliverables. 'markdown' + 'json' is the canonical pair required by DELIVERABLE_CONTRACT.md. Additional formats (xlsx, csv, etc.) are converted FROM the canonical artifacts by downstream tooling — never regenerated. Defaults to ["markdown", "json"].

default_output_dir.description: Wave 10: where this agent writes its deliverables by default. Convention: 'docs/reports/<agent-id>/'. Consumers may override per-invocation but the agent's AGENT.md must declare the default.
